TestCase z9Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_v = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_v, t1.v, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.v = follow_case_v;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n == 0
    if (follow_case.n > 0) {
        double first = follow_case.v[0];
        for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n - 1; ++i) {
            follow_case.v[i] = follow_case.v[i + 1];
        }
        follow_case.v[follow_case.n - 1] = first;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
